spec.name: A Private Home
spec.description: The interior of this home is simple and rustic. A ladder leads up to the loft, where the sleeping pallets are tucked away. A wood-burning stove keeps the place well heated and cozy. A homemade rocking chair stands crooked in the corner, draped with a old looking afghan. This home is a nice place, very comfortable.

west.description: There is a normal appearing door set in the western wall.
